design_philosophy: Color is function only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. High contrast with dense, technical spacing for a command-center feel.

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Generous (p-4, p-6, p-8) for structural containers, Dense (p-2, p-3) for data/code blocks
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for all paragraphs, labels, dense content, code, and chat bubbles. Optical alignment for icons.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Technical grid look with border-r border-b border-border/40 for panels.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges, cardless or max 4px (rounded-sm) border-radius

surface_strategies.panels: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, no shadow.
surface_strategies.code_viewer: Retro-Futurism Terminal Look: Deep black background (#0A0A0A), JetBrains Mono text, subtle glowing border for active state.
surface_strategies.sticky_header: Optical Clarity Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5

motion_and_interaction.loading: Use The 'Tracing Beam' effect for pipeline progress. A glowing accent gradient line tracing the border.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-black/80. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-primary hover:bg-black/5.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp corners, border-border, focus-visible:ring-accent.
components.tabs: Flat. Active tab gets a bold border-b-2 border-primary or accent, inactive tabs are text-muted hover:text-primary.
components.cards: Go cardless. Use rectangular, dense styles with right and bottom borders.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (Standard UI), or @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard moments.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric logo for the Zappizo brand top left header
User profile avatar for the top right corner or chat messages

key_features_implementation.Chat Interface: Left-aligned sidebar panel (approx 30% width). Distinct user vs AI chat blocks. AI bubbles should have subtle 'Tracing Beam' border when generating.
key_features_implementation.ERP Architecture Preview: Main central area. Tabbed navigation (Modules, DB Schema, API, Code). Use monospace fonts for DB and API tables.
key_features_implementation.Code Preview: Deep black terminal-like panel with syntax highlighting. Use JetBrains Mono.
key_features_implementation.Version History & Pipeline: Right-aligned collapsible drawer or top-level horizontal progress bar using 'Tracing Beam' active state.
key_features_implementation.JSON State Viewer: Monospace tree-view component. High contrast syntax colors (Strings: green, Keys: blue, Numbers: orange).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT use teal or purple-blue gradients.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` or `lucide-react` for technical, sharp icons.
Implement the 'Bento Control Room' grid for the main layout. Ensure h-full on children to match neighbors.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Never use Inter for headings.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="chat-input"`).
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrapper if it enforces rounded corners; use raw divs with `border-border/40` to create a grid/technical look.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text. The text colors specified meet this requirement.
Do not use generic empty states. Add actionable CTA buttons within the empty states.
